hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\[lints'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not modify lint configuration'; exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qF 'web/index.html' && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '__UPDATES__'; then echo 'BLOCKED: __UPDATES__ placeholder is injected by CI — edit UPDATES.md instead'; exit 2; fi
